metadata.description: toggles Constructor Autocomplete API calls and logic to use Constructor data in autocomplete results
toggles Constructor Browse and API calls
toggles Constructor Recommendations logic
toggles Constructor search/shop routing and API calls
Hide Customer Ratings facet links from search engine crawlers.
toggle for the overall changes from LECOM_BUY-368 - on the Order Review page
The hiding/showing of the remove/edit/save for later links - on the Order Review page
toggle to relocate the Saved for Later display away from its own tab to the bottom of the Shopping Bag
toggle for Order Summary to be sticky on Shopping Bag in Desktop view
toggle for placing items at the top of the page - on the Order Review page
toggle for switching between new and old UPS api calls
toggles circle swatch rendering on pdp using big swatch images and scene 7 circle template.
adds product detail header sections to the ux.
Enhance Promobar with new Shipping information (offerdetailservlet)
toggles SSR rendering of the global navigation menu.
toggle for new drawer ux for PDP Details.
toggles sales payment editbillto route
toggles ability to favorite products as well as favorite cta visibility throughout the site.
toggle for free shipping calculator redesign showing in shopping bag
toggles visibility of PDP Reviews/QA drawer
Toggle to turn off Stripe on/off the Website
Toggle to turn off Stripe payment methods on PDP
Toggle to turn off Stripe payment methods on Shopping Bag
Hide products bullets descriptions
Move rating summary under the Product title
change size charts buttons to the text link style
Size buttons styles improvements
Suppress arrival date for backordered items
Toggle for switching the FE logic between Narvar and Happy Returns Code. This can be removed after Narvar is baked in
toggles the new sold out display experience for mobile and desktop
toggle for showing mobile hamburger account menu restyle changes
toggle for showing mobile hamburger help menu restyle changes
toggles mobile hamburger menu styles for Global Navigation restyle epic
toggles the hiding and showing of the mobile SMS signup field on order confirm
toggle to show lowercase first letters in monogramming words
toggle for sign in banner and breadcrumb showing across all my account pages
toggle for PDP bullet sections having fixed order of Fit, Feature, Fabric.
toggles inclusion of Q&A html content injection for SSR PDP
New Quick View for Stylitics PDP
toggles Rokt placement on the payment page
toggle for switching between send order to narvar
toggle to show restriction of the first char (alphanumer. only) of the city field in the address form
toggles terms of service redirect for footer and order summary
toggles S7 conversion of product images to webp format
toggles S7 conversion of product images to webp format in all vendor datafeed files (independent of webpProductImage flag)

productCopies.description: Men's Long Sleeve Easy Fit Sail Rigger Oxford Shirt
fitBullets: Easy fit, opened up for ease over body
featureBullets: Soft-yet-substantial, exclusive basketweave Oxford cloth
Buttondown collar
Two-ply box pleated yoke with locker loop for easy hanging
Long sleeves with adjustable two-button cuffs and placket
Single chest pocket
Gusseted side seam adds a distinctive touch
productCopies.subHeader: A new fit option for long-sleeve Sail Rigger™ Oxford.
productCopies.overview: Now, you can get your favorite Oxford shirt in an updated easy fit that offers a cleaner silhouette! Crafted with the same exclusive weave using thicker yarns, you’ll enjoy the same substantial fabric true to Oxford heritage. It gets naturally more comfortable with each wash, looking casually unpressed right out of the dryer for an easy-wearing style without dragging out the ironing board (but we won’t hold it against you if you do). We’ve tailored it nicely as well, with a classic buttondown collar, box pleat back yoke and chest pocket.
